properties.name: ExcludeSinglePartAssemblies
properties.summary: Boolean indicating whether single part assemblies are excluded.

properties.name: ExportAllObjects
properties.summary: Boolean indicating whether to export all objects.

properties.name: ExportBrepAsExactSolid
properties.summary: Boolean indicating whether BREP is exported as exact solid.

properties.name: ExportBuildingHierarchy
properties.summary: Boolean indicating whether the building hierarchy export is enabled.

properties.name: ExportFlatBeamsAsPlates
properties.summary: Boolean indicating whether flat beams are exported as plates.

properties.name: ExportLocationsFromOrganizer
properties.summary: Boolean indicating whether locations are obtained from the organizer.

properties.name: ExportPolyBeamAsSectionedSpine
properties.summary: Boolean indicating whether polybeams are exported as sectioned spines.

properties.name: ExportSelectedObjectsAndTheirAssemblies
properties.summary: Boolean indicating whether to export selected objects and their assemblies.

properties.name: IncludeAssemblyHiearachy
properties.summary: Boolean indicating whether the assembly hierarhcy (IFCELEMENTASSEMBLY) is exported.

properties.name: IsBoltsEnabled
properties.summary: Boolean indicating whether the bolts export is enabled.

properties.name: IsGridsEnabled
properties.summary: Boolean indicating whether the grids export is enabled.

properties.name: IsPoursEnabled
properties.summary: Pours export is enabled. True for pours, false for CIP cast-units and/or parts

properties.name: IsRebarsEnabled
properties.summary: Boolean indicating whether the rebars export is enabled.

properties.name: IsSpacesEnabled
properties.summary: Boolean indicating whether the export of spaces in building hierarchy is enabled.

properties.name: IsSurfaceTreatmentsAndSurfacesEnabled
properties.summary: Boolean indicating whether the surfaces and surface treatments export is enabled.

properties.name: IsWeldsEnabled
properties.summary: Boolean indicating whether the welds export is enabled.
